steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The question asks what Ambopteryx and Yutyrannus had in common. The text describes Ambopteryx as a winged dinosaur with feathers and says research indicates that the wingless, large Yutyrannus likely had feathers too.

steps.title: Eliminate unsupported traits
steps.content: Choice A mentions a shared predator, which the text never discusses. Choice B is wrong because Ambopteryx is described as winged. Choice C is wrong because the text does not say both could fly. The shared trait named in the text is feathers. The answer is D.
